title: Apple raises full-year services outlook after stronger-than-expected quarter
body: Apple reported stronger-than-expected services growth and raised full-year outlook in an 8-K update. Management highlighted resilient demand and margin expansion.

title: Nvidia wins major multi-year cloud infrastructure contract with sovereign AI consortium
body: The new agreement is expected to expand Nvidia's data center backlog and strengthen demand visibility over the next several quarters.

title: Tesla faces production delay at key plant after supplier outage
body: Reports say Tesla may face a temporary production delay after a supplier outage disrupted a key component line. Analysts warn near-term deliveries could be affected.

title: Tesla faces production delay at key plant after supplier outage
body: Tesla may see near-term delivery pressure after a supplier outage disrupted production at a key plant, according to syndicated reports.

title: EU opens fresh antitrust investigation into Microsoft's enterprise bundling practices
body: The new investigation could create legal overhang and increase uncertainty for enterprise product bundling in Europe.

title: Amazon director reports sizable open-market share purchase
body: A Form 4 filing shows a director purchased shares in the open market, a signal often watched for insider conviction.

title: US inflation comes in cooler than expected, boosting risk appetite across growth sectors
body: A softer inflation print lifted expectations for a more dovish rate path and sparked a rally in long-duration growth names.

title: Meta shares climb after brokerage upgrade and higher price target
body: A brokerage upgraded Meta and lifted its target after improved ad monetization checks and stronger engagement trends.
